query:
INSERT INTO activity_queue (
                workflow_id, activity_key, worker, name, parameters,
                status, claimed_at, timeout_duration, retry_count, max_retries
            )
            VALUES (
                $1, $2, 'test', 'task', '{}',
                'running', NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours', INTERVAL '1 hour', 3, 3
            )
